name: Landlord Studio
description: Landlord Studio is a property management platform founded in 2014 that helps landlords and property managers track rental income and expenses, collect rent online, screen tenants, manage documents, and generate financial reports including Schedule E tax-ready summaries. The platform integrates with Xero for accounting synchronization and Plaid for bank feed connectivity.

itemListElement.name: Property Management Platform
itemListElement.description: Manage rental properties, track income and expenses, generate financial reports, collect rent online, and manage tenant communications.

itemListElement.name: Nexus MTD
itemListElement.description: Making Tax Digital (MTD) compliance layer for UK letting agents connecting to Reapit, PayProp, SME Professional, LettsPay, and Alto.
